zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Furnival於1200年之後出生在英國越可爾雪菲爾時，他的父親Gerard de Furnival8824歲，母親Maud Luvetot8821歲。他和Bertha Ferrers至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1238年4月13日，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾沃可索普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Furnival于1200年之后出生在英国越可爾雪菲爾时，他的父亲Gerard de Furnival8824岁，母亲Maud Luvetot8821岁。他和Bertha Ferrers至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1238年4月13日，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾沃可索普。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Furnival
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: locative name from Fourneville (Calvados), Fournival in Saint-Just-en-Chaussée (Oise), or Fournival in Saint-Julien-sur-Sarthe (Orne).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Furnival was born after 1200, in Sheffield, Yorkshire, England, his father, Gerard de Furnival, was 8824 and his mother, Maud Luvetot, was 8821. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Bertha Ferrers. He died on 13 April 1238, and was buried in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Furnival est né après 1200, à Sheffield, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Gerard de Furnival, avait 8824 ans et sa mère, Maud Luvetot, avait 8821 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Bertha Ferrers. Il est décédé le 13 avril 1238, et a été enterré à Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Furnival nach 1200 in Sheffield, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gerard de Furnival 8824 und seine Mutter Maud Luvetot 8821. Er hatte mit Bertha Ferrers mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 13. April 1238 und wurde in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Furnivalが1200年以後にイギリスヨークシュアイアシェフィールドで生まれた時，父Gerard de Furnivalは8824歳，母Maud Luvetotは8821歳であった。彼はBertha Ferrersとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1238年4月13日に死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウオルクソップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Furnival(이)가 1200년 이후 영국 요르크실르 셰필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerard de Furnival(은)는 8824세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Luvetot(은)는 8821세였다. 그는 Bertha Ferrers(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1238년 4월 13일 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 워크소프에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Furnival родился после 1200 г. в местности шеффиелд, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Gerard de Furnival было 8824 года, а матери, которую звали Maud Luvetot, 8821. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Bertha Ferrers. Он умер 13 апреля 1238 г. и был похоронен в местности ворксоп, ноттингхамшир, Англия.
